roa.docketEntryComment: /CAL:PRELIMINARY HEARING/X:TODAY'S PRELIMINARY HEARING IS VACATED/X:DEFENDANT ENTERS INTO AN INFORMAL DIVERSION/X:PART OF THE NEGOTIATED INFORMAL DIVERSION IS DEFENDANT WILL NOT ENTER PLEA FOR 6 MONTHS, MUST ABIDE BY THE PREVIOUS FILED STAY AWAY ORDER AND NOT ASSOCIATE WITH THE CO-DEFENDANTS FROMTHIS CASE/COMUN:20/X:DEFENDANT TO ENROLL AND COMPLETE 12 CLASSES ON THINKING FOR A CHANGE/X:THE 20 HOURS COMMUNITY SERVICE AND THE 12 CLASSES ARETO BE  MONITORED BY THE PTD/X:IF THE DEFENDANT IS SUCCESSFUL IN COMPLETINGTHESE TERMS AND DOES NOT PICK UP ANY NEW ARREST LEADING TO NEW CHARGES, CASE WILL BE DISMISSED PURSUANT 1001,7PC/EMTERM/CONTD PTD PROG RPT/PROGPTD:06-15-22/CONTD:PRETRIAL DIVERSION PROGRESS REPORT/

/CAL:MOTION TO CORRECT MINUTES/CAL: DEFENSE MOTION TO CORRECT PRIOR MINUTES/EMMOD: HOME DETENTION IS TERMINATED, DEFENDANT ALLOWED TO ATTEND COURT IN SONOMA COUNTY/X: FUTURE DATE OF 05-12-22 CONFIRMED/

/CAL: ADD TO CALENDAR FOR CUSTODY STATUS AND TO BE HEARD WITH 21007493 AND21007598/ACM/X:AS A CONDITION OF RELEASE, THE DEFENDANT SHALL BE PLACED ON HOME DETENTION MONITORING BY THE SHERIFF'S OFFICE,/DEF:SHALL BE FITTED WITH A GPS DEVICE AND IS ORDERED TO COMPLY WITH ALL TERMS OF RELEASE AS SETFORTH ON THE RECORD AND BY THE SFSO/CTORD: DEFENDANT SHALL BE RELEASED AFTER A COORDINATED PICK-UP WITH SFSO COMMUNITY PROGRAMS IS IN PLACE,/X: DEFENDANT ALLOWED TO GO TO WORK AND CHURCH/X:SEE SIGNED ORDER IN FILE,/WS/CONTD: TO SET PRELIMINARY HEARING/

/CAL: PRELIMINARY HEARING AND DA MOTION TO CONSOLIDATE/MOT DENIED/X: WITHOUT PRJUDICE/STWPX/X: INFORMAL DIVERSION/X: THE CONDITIONS OF THE DIVERSION ARE: 6 MONTH DURATION, 10 HOURS OF COMMUNITY SERVICE AND NO NEW CHARGES//CCC: #21007493 AND #21007598/CONTD: INFORMAL DIVERSION PROGRESS REPORT/DOPU: POSITIVE REPORT/
